metrics.name: Accounting correctness
metrics.desc:
Protocol version,Drift Protocol V2.
Deployment status,Open mainnet launched December 19, 2022.
Product scope,Perps, spot, cross-collateral deposits, yield, borrow/lend, single pool of capital.
P&L types,Unrealized P&L, settled P&L, claimable/unsettled P&L.
P&L settlement mechanism,`settlePNL` settles unrealized P&L into per-market P&L pool.
Positive P&L withdrawal limitation,Positive realized P&L may be unavailable if the P&L pool lacks funds.
uP&L margin guardrail,V2 introduced uP&L asset weight.
Settled and realized P&L guardrail,V2 introduced settled and realized P&L controls.
Exchange auto-settlement,Introduced in V2.
Borrow/lend accounting,Interest automatically accrues to accounts.
Known accounting exploit,Not found as primary root cause.
Current impairment context,April 2026 exploit affected protocol deposits, but root cause was privileged-control compromise.

metrics.name: Accounting correctness
metrics.desc:
V2 improved V1's P&L and settlement controls materially.
Accounting remains complex because perps, spot, borrow/lend, cross-collateral, unsettled P&L, and insurance interact.
Positive P&L can be real but not immediately withdrawable if the P&L pool is insufficient.
The April 2026 loss is not scored here as a direct accounting bug.

metrics.name: Liquidation reliability
metrics.desc:
Liquidation scope,Perps and borrow/lend liquidation risk disclosed.
Liquidation threshold,Collateral below maintenance margin creates liquidation risk.
Untimely liquidation risk,Disclosed for large-scale liquidations and market turmoil.
Negative-balance treatment,Shortfall treated as levered loss.
Insurance fund role,First backstop to exchange solvency.
Perp bankruptcy hierarchy,External Insurance Fund, internal insurance, socialized loss.
Insurance limits,Perp losses covered up to per-market limits.
Socialized loss condition,Losses beyond insurance limits may be socialized.
Liquidator availability,Open-source example bots for liquidators and fillers.
Market-specific liquidity,Excluded.
Borrower concentration,Excluded.

metrics.name: Liquidation reliability
metrics.desc:
V2 has a defined liquidation and bankruptcy-resolution hierarchy.
Insurance and internal backstops reduce but do not eliminate deficit risk.
Socialized loss remains an explicit terminal pathway.
This anchor excludes market-specific liquidity and borrower concentration.

metrics.name: Oracle integrity
metrics.desc:
Liquidity design,JIT auction liquidity, AMM liquidity, and orderbook liquidity.
AMM risk,AMM is counterparty to trades against it and has delta risk.
Long/short imbalance risk,Disclosed.
Oracle provider,Drift relies on Pyth price feeds for liquidations.
Oracle failure consequence,Incorrect prices can cause wrongful liquidations and loss of funds.
Multi-step oracle validity checks,Implemented in V2.
Dynamic AMM bid/ask spread,Implemented in V2.
AMM toxic-flow prevention,Implemented in V2.
No off-setting loss risk,Disclosed for unrealized AMM P&L.
2026 exploit oracle component,Attacker reportedly changed oracle/collateral configuration via admin control.

metrics.name: Oracle integrity
metrics.desc:
V2 added meaningful oracle, P&L, spread, and toxic-flow guardrails.
AMM delta risk, oracle dependence, and unbounded unrealized P&L remain protocol-level model risks.
The 2026 fake-oracle/collateral path is counted mainly under admin/control because it depended on privileged takeover.
The anchor remains medium risk rather than high because no standalone AMM-math exploit was identified from the reviewed sources.

metrics.name: Governance and upgrade safety
metrics.desc:
DAO structure,Realms DAO, Security Council, and Futarchy DAO described.
Security Council role,Governs protocol upgrades.
Attached prior governance evidence,2/5 multisig, zero timelock, no delay window, governance bypass noted.
April 1, 2026 incident,Unauthorized access to Security Council administrative powers reported.
April 1, 2026 loss amount,Approximately $285 million reported.
Attack method,Durable nonce and social-engineering transaction approval attack reported.
Privileged effect,Full admin privileges used to create malicious collateral, change oracle, relax withdrawal protections, and drain assets.
Drift official recovery status,Drift said it was investigating, designing recovery, and structuring a more secure relaunch after April 1.
Affected products,Borrow/lend, vault deposits, and trading deposits reported affected.
Full official postmortem,Not found.

metrics.name: Governance and upgrade safety
metrics.desc:
A recent severe privileged-control compromise caused protocol-level impairment.
The exploit path appears to have bypassed audited smart-contract logic through governance/admin execution.
The risk is protocol-level because admin authority could affect collateral listings, oracle configuration, withdrawals, and funds across products.
This is not double-counted as AMM math failure or ordinary liquidation failure.

metrics.name: Product and balance-sheet complexity
metrics.desc:
V2 product scope,Perps, spot, cross-collateral deposits, yield, borrow/lend.
Capital model,Single pool of capital.
Cross-margining,Drift brings on-chain, cross-margined perpetual futures to Solana.
Insurance pools,Separate pools by asset with USDC supporting perpetual liquidations.
Market-specific borrower concentration,Excluded.

metrics.name: Product and balance-sheet complexity
metrics.desc:
V2 is materially more complex than a single-product perp AMM.
Perps, spot, lending, insurance, and P&L settlement create cross-module balance-sheet interactions.
This amplifies protocol-level risk without assigning any specific market risk.

metrics.name: Solana execution and infrastructure dependency
metrics.desc:
Chain,Solana.
Blockchain risk,Solana uncertainty and security risks disclosed.
Keeper/bot dependency,Example liquidator, maker, filler bots provided.
RPC dependency,Liquidation-bot docs reference RPC checks and monitoring.
Durable nonce incident,Solana durable nonce mechanism reportedly used in 2026 attack.

metrics.name: Solana execution and infrastructure dependency
metrics.desc:
Solana execution, RPC, and keeper liveness affect liquidation and settlement.
Durable-nonce exposure was relevant to the 2026 admin compromise.
The multiplier is modest because Solana dependency is not itself a Drift accounting bug.

metrics.name: Dependency robustness
metrics.desc:
Oracle dependency,Pyth relied on for liquidations.
JIT/orderbook dependency,Hybrid liquidity combines off-chain keepers and on-chain settlement.
Insurance dependency,External Insurance Fund and internal insurance used before socialized loss.
Third-party dependency diversification,Partial.
Oracle-provider diversification,Not found.

metrics.name: Dependency robustness
metrics.desc:
Pyth, keepers, liquidity providers, and insurance pools are important protocol dependencies.
V2 has meaningful guardrails, but dependency concentration remains.
Oracle risk itself is scored in the oracle anchor, so this modifier is kept modest.

metrics.name: Audits
metrics.desc:
Trail of Bits audit,No high-severity flaws affecting confidentiality, integrity, or availability reported.
Trail of Bits remediation review,January 23–25, 2023.
Outstanding findings,Unresolved or partially resolved findings existed.
Neodyme audit scope,protocol-v2.
Neodyme timing,Authored May 10, 2024; last updated June 27, 2024.
OtterSec scope,MetaMask Snap Connect, not core V2 protocol.
2026 exploit relation,Reported as governance/admin and social-engineering path, not audited-code exploit.

metrics.name: Audits
metrics.desc:
V2 had meaningful audit coverage from reputable firms.
Audit coverage reduces smart-contract implementation risk.
The 2026 incident shows audits did not cover or prevent all control-plane failure modes.

metrics.name: Formal verification
metrics.desc:
Formal verification of V2 margin logic,Not found.
Formal verification of V2 P&L accounting,Not found.
Formal verification of V2 liquidation logic,Not found.
Formal verification of V2 oracle/AMM logic,Not found.
Public formal-verification reports,Not found.

metrics.name: Formal verification
metrics.desc:
V2 contains math-sensitive accounting, margin, liquidation, oracle, and AMM logic.
No public formal-verification evidence was found.
The penalty is modest because audits and testing exist.

metrics.name: Testing
metrics.desc:
Rust tests,Documented.
JavaScript tests,Documented.
Agent-based simulations,Used before V2 open mainnet.
Stress testing,Comprehensive simulations claimed.
Public full coverage report,Not found.

metrics.name: Testing
metrics.desc:
Public tests and simulations provide real assurance.
The assurance is incomplete because coverage detail is not fully established.
Testing did not prevent the governance/admin failure mode.

metrics.name: Monitoring
metrics.desc:
Liquidation bot monitoring,Docs encourage monitoring prices and running liquidation/RPC checks.
Incident detection outcome,Deposits and withdrawals suspended during active April 2026 attack.
Attack execution,Reported rapid takeover of Security Council administrative powers.
Recovery status,Post-incident workstreams included investigation, recovery design, and more secure relaunch.
Real-time admin-action timelock,Zero timelock reported in incident analyses.

metrics.name: Monitoring
metrics.desc:
Monitoring and execution controls failed to prevent or contain a severe privileged-action attack.
Zero-timelock fast execution materially reduced detection-and-response time.
This is scored as monitoring/control assurance, not as a separate protocol anchor.

metrics.name: Incident history
metrics.desc:
April 1, 2026 incident,Confirmed by multiple sources.
Estimated loss,Approximately $280–285 million.
Root-cause type,Durable nonce, social engineering, Security Council/admin takeover.
Drift official recovery update,Published April 16, 2026.
Full official postmortem,Not found.
Repeated V2 exploit history,Not found.

metrics.name: Incident history
metrics.desc:
A recent severe protocol-level incident is a strong negative assurance signal.
The incident caused direct user-claim impairment.
The multiplier is capped within the typical range because the same event is already scored under admin/control safety.

metrics.name: Operational changes history
metrics.desc:
V2 open mainnet,December 19, 2022.
V2 product expansions,Spot, borrow/lend, cross-collateral, later markets and integrations.
Active releases,protocol-v2 releases continuing into 2026.
Security Council migration timing,Reported shortly before April 2026 incident.
Relaunch/security restructuring,Officially stated after incident.

metrics.name: Operational changes history
metrics.desc:
Active change cadence and broad product expansion increase change-management risk.
The reported Security Council migration shortly before the exploit is a material operational-risk signal.
Ongoing relaunch work may reduce risk later, but does not remove the historical impairment.

metrics.name: System maturity and production track record
metrics.desc:
V2 open mainnet date,December 19, 2022.
Production duration before incident,More than three years.
Public repository maturity,Active open-source protocol-v2 repository.
Production scale,Drift described as a major Solana perp exchange.
Current status,Recovery and relaunch planning after April 2026 incident.

metrics.name: System maturity and production track record
metrics.desc:
Multi-year production history and open-source maturity provide positive assurance.
The benefit is limited because the recent exploit materially weakens the track record.
Current recovery status prevents stronger maturity credit.

metrics.name: Anchor scoring
metrics.desc:
Anchor,Score,Anchor PD
Accounting correctness,3,2.00%
Liquidation reliability,3,2.00%
Oracle integrity,3,2.00%
Governance and upgrade safety,5,10.00%

metrics.name: Control modifiers scoring
metrics.desc:
Modifier,Score
Product and balance-sheet complexity,1.15
Solana execution and infrastructure dependency,1.05
Dependency robustness,1.05

metrics.name: Assurance scoring
metrics.desc:
Multiplier,Score
Audits,0.95
Formal verification,1.05
Testing,0.95
Monitoring,1.15
Incidents history,1.15
Operational changes history,1.10
System maturity and production track record,0.95
